scripts.format:check: pnpm -F api run format:check && pnpm -F client run format:check
scripts.format:fix: pnpm -F api run format:fix && pnpm -F client run format:fix
scripts.lint:check: pnpm -F api run lint:check && pnpm -F client run lint:check
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm -F api run lint:fix && pnpm -F client run lint:fix
